# Refinement Output Template

## Goal

- State the user or business outcome the item is expected to achieve.

## Scope

- Included scope.
- Excluded scope.

## Acceptance Criteria

- List concrete behaviors or conditions for acceptance.

## Dependencies And Constraints

- External dependencies.
- Internal dependencies.
- Constraints or assumptions.

## Risks And Open Questions

- Main delivery or requirement risks.
- Questions that block readiness.

## Proposed Slicing

- Suggested split into smaller increments when useful.

## Readiness Verdict

- Ready, partially ready, or not ready.
- Explain what is still missing if not ready.
